name: TEXAS CAVIAR on GRILLED RUSTIC BREAD

ingredients.item: 2 whole sun-dried tomatoes, or scant ¼ cup diced sun-dried tomatoes
ingredients.original: 2 whole sun-dried tomatoes, or scant ¼ cup diced sun-dried tomatoes

ingredients.item: ⅔ cup dried black-eyed peas, sorted and soaked in water overnight
ingredients.original: ⅔ cup dried black-eyed peas, sorted and soaked in water overnight

ingredients.item: 1½ cups diced seeded heirloom tomatoes, in ¼-inch pieces
ingredients.original: 1½ cups diced seeded heirloom tomatoes, in ¼-inch pieces

ingredients.item: 1 cup diced green bell pepper, in ¼-inch pieces
ingredients.original: 1 cup diced green bell pepper, in ¼-inch pieces

ingredients.item: ½ cup diced yellow bell pepper, in ¼-inch pieces
ingredients.original: ½ cup diced yellow bell pepper, in ¼-inch pieces

ingredients.item: ¼ cup diced red onion, in ¼-inch pieces
ingredients.original: ¼ cup diced red onion, in ¼-inch pieces

ingredients.item: 2 jalapeño chiles, seeded and diced into ¼-inch pieces
ingredients.original: 2 jalapeño chiles, seeded and diced into ¼-inch pieces

ingredients.item: 1 large loaf rustic bread, cut into about twelve ½- to ¾-inch-thick slices
ingredients.original: 1 large loaf rustic bread, cut into about twelve ½- to ¾-inch-thick slices
